h729e409dgdd7cg493bgae3fg5a54ed58c2d0: It feels like we packed three days into one today. I'm exhausted.
h8bb87cb8ga217g44f3g925dg543b482a6b92: Speak for yourself - I feel fine.
h58b5e05cg4af4g4516gbed0gad9974d1dba5: Is that so? The look in your eyes suggests otherwise. I'm going to rest; you should do the same.
hf105651dg098cg433cgac06g85fa9a4511d7: You sure it's just fatigue from the day? Not something else?
ha3765617g0268g414fg93c4g4d3556c5e5b1: The tadpole...? I don't know. But if anything happens to me, you know what to do.
h68ebc6a2gd854g4c96gb89dg7c13b608b868: You as well...? I feel like I've marched across Toril without stopping.
h4acdb81dg7a8eg4a88g91dag108955617836: Could be the tadpoles' doing. Or not. We'll just have to wait and see.
hc65f0b40g94a8g475egb812gd67d692a9305: Forget about how you feel - what about Lae'zel? She almost turned on us!
he2f0a36cge9bcg466ag80cfgf003aaf09cc2: That was always a risk with her. I'm not even sure you can blame the tadpoles for that.
h9641747bgf2b2g4604gbea9g22daa5173050: Get some rest, but keep an eye on her.
h7e49b040g701cg4493gb59dgf4ca8f80839f: Never mind that - what about Lae'zel? We had to kill her.
h07475e55g18d4g48e1ga3f9g79961f7fa72a: Yes - had to. She didn't leave us much choice.
hceff9d45g122dg4240ga380ga0572cbbb973: Maybe it was the tadpole. Or maybe she just showed us her true colours - I don't know.
hbc26f1d0g7b46g4b91ga7c5ged406699d606: Let's just hope we don't share her fate. Get some rest - I need to clear my head.
hdf8ff946ga062g49ccg87c4g4cbf5ed8c892: Never mind that - what about Lae'zel? We had to kill her.
